turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh, hi there. I'm calling to set up an appointment for my right knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thank you

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it’s been bothering me for a few weeks, especially on the inside.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hi.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Can you tell me a bit more about what's been bothering you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, so it started after a run, and now it aches on the inside, it clicks when I bend it, and sometimes it feels like it might give out when I go down stairs.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for sharing those details.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Which part of your body is hurting? Your knee, ankle, or somewhere else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It's my right knee that's hurting.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, so

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Understood.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to create a demo patient profile so I can help you further?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I just need your first and last name.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, uh,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Right, it's Richard Feynman.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July 4, 2000 for demo purposes.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, my date of birth is August 4th, 2000. Just want to make sure that’s right in there.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I have your date of birth as August 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that's correct.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to schedule an appointment to have your right knee checked out?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’s exactly what I’m looking to do.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: It sounds like you need an appointment for knee pain that started after running and has lasted a few weeks.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Does that sound right?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, exactly. It’s been aching and clicking, so I want to get it checked out.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or are you hoping to the next available appointment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m not really

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m good with the next available.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: We have openings tomorrow, Tuesday, with your primary providers at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Okay, what

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you prefer morning or afternoon?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can suggest a few specific times.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Morning would be better for me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Here are a few morning options for tomorrow.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You can see Dr. Zignu-Lukosky at 815.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would any of these work for you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let’s go with 8:30.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for Tuesday, June 30th at 8.30 a.m. with Dr. Zbigniew Lukoski at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs, if you have them.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else you need help with?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I’m all set. Thanks a lot, take care.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set for your appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take care, and I hope your knee feels better soon.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Appreciate that. Bye now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Bye.
